extension.description: Access your favorite movies and shows from FTP servers.

extension.news: v. 1.0.8 "Jubilee Year Update" - 2026-03-31 - **Improved & Fixed**: AnySex, Ashemaletube, AVJoy, Beeg, Fuqer, Hanime, HQPorner, LetMeJerk, LuxureTV, Nudez, OK.xxx, PornHits, PornZog, Rule34Video, SaintPorn, Shameless, Shemalez, SunPorno, SxyPrn, Thumbzilla, Tube8, UFlash, Upornia, Veporn, VikiPorn, VJav, xCafe, XMoviesForYou, YouJizz, YouPorn. - **Playback & Performance**: Improved startup time or stream selection for Nudez, SunPorno, xCafe and YouJizz; added a platform-specific Nudez playback path for Windows and Android. - **Removed**: RealCuckoldSex (domain for sale), TubeDupe (site currently only serves fixed 6-minute clips). - **Validation**: Expanded KVAT full-site regression coverage and completed a broad post-1.0.7 repair pass across the addon. - **10th Anniversary Year**: 2026 continues as AdultHideout's anniversary year, with follow-up stability updates after the 1.0.7 release.

extension.description: Browse and play movies directly from your specified local IP servers.

extension.summary: Cumination, the culmination of adult sites on Kodi
extension.description: Cumination, the culmination of adult sites on Kodi
extension.disclaimer: The author does not host or distribute any of the content displayed by this addon. The author does not have any affiliation with the sites offered. Click on About from the contextmenu on each site to check for contact details.

extension.description: Elementum это дополнение для поиска и воспроизведения торрентов. Дополнение не ходит на запрещенные сайты самостоятельно. Хотя, для поиска используются дополнения (называемые провайдерами), которые устанавливаются отдельно.[CR]Этот проект является ответвлением хорошо извесных, но не поддерживаемых Pulsar/Quasar от steeve и scakemyer.

Elementum is a torrent finding and streaming engine. It doesn't go on torrent websites for legal reasons. However, it calls specially crafted add-ons (called providers) that are installed separately.[CR]This project is a fork of the well known, but no longer maintained Pulsar/Quasar projects from steeve and scakemyer.

Elementum je pogon pretraživanja i strujanja. Ne posjećuje torrent web stranice iz pravnih razloga. Ipak, koristi posebno napravljene dodatke (nazvane pružatelji usluge) koji su instalirani odvojeno.[CR]Ovaj projekt je ogranak dobro poznatih, ali više ne održavanih Pulsar/Quasar projekata od autora steevea i scakemyera.

Elementum es un motor de búsqueda y transmisión torrent. No navega por sitios web torrent por razones legales. Sin embargo, llama a complementos especialmente diseñados para ello (denominados providers o proveedores) que se instalan por separado.[CR]Este proyecto es un fork de los bien conocidos, pero ya sin soporte proyectos Pulsar/Quasar de steeve y scakemyer.[CR]

Elementum är en torrentsöknings- och strömningsmotor. Det går inte till torrentwebbplatser av juridiska skäl. Den anropar dock speciellt utformade tillägg (kallade leverantörer) som installeras separat.[CR]Detta projekt är en förgrening av de välkända, men inte längre underhållna Pulsar/Quasar-projekten av steeve och scakemyer.
extension.disclaimer: Автор дополнения не несёт ответственности за скачивание или поиск информации и содержимого в этом дополнении. Автор никак не связан с Kodi, командой Kodi, или XBMC Foundation.
The author does not own or host any content found within this Addon. The author is not connected to or in any other way affiliated with Kodi, Team Kodi, or the XBMC Foundation.
Autor ovog dodatka ne posjeduje i ne distribuira bilo kakav sadržaj koji je pronađen. Autor nije povezan sa ili na bilo koji drugi način bilo sa Kodijem, Team Kodijem ili XBMC fundacijom.
El autor no posee ni aloja ningún contenido que se encuentre a través de este complemento. El autor no está unido ni relacionado de ninguna manera con Kodi, Team Kodi, o XBMC Foundation.
Skaparen äger inte eller är värd av något innehåll som finns i detta tillägg. Författaren är inte ansluten till eller på något annat sätt en del av Kodi, Team Kodi eller XBMC Foundation.

A flexible addon to play video content from any XML structure hosted on GitHub.

extension.disclaimer: The author of this addon do not host any of the content which is found and have no affiliation with any of the content providers. This addon simply searches websites for content. Use at your own risk!

extension.summary: Spielen Sie Videos von verschiedenen Streaming-Sites für Erwachsene ab
Play videos from different adult streaming sites
Lire des vidéos de différents sites de streaming pour adultes
Reproduza vídeos de diferentes sites de streaming adulto
Spela videor från olika streaming-webbplatser för vuxna
extension.description: Dieses Addon spielt Videos von YouPorn, Tube8, Boysfood, MoviesAnd, PornoTube, xHamster, KeezMovies und einigen anderen Streaming-Sites für Erwachsene ab. Es enthält explizites Material für Erwachsene. Sie können dieses Addon nur anzeigen, wenn Sie mindestens 18 Jahre alt sind oder mindestens das Alter der Mehrheit in dem Land, in dem Sie wohnen oder von dem aus Sie auf diese Inhalte zugreifen. Wenn Sie diese Anforderungen nicht erfüllen, haben Sie keine Berechtigung, dieses Addon zu verwenden.

This addon plays videos from YouPorn, Tube8, Boysfood, MoviesAnd, PornoTube, xHamster, KeezMovies and some other adult streaming sites. It contains explicit adult material. You may only view this addon if you are at least 18 years of age, or at least the age of majority in the jurisdiction where you reside or from which you access this content. If you do not meet these requirements, then you do not have permission to use this addon.

Tämä lisäosa toistaa videoita YouPorn, Tube8, Boysfood, MoviesAnd, PornoTube, xHamster, KeezMovies ja joistakin muista aikuisten suoratoistosivustoista. Se sisältää nimenomaista aikuisille tarkoitettua materiaalia. Voit tarkastella tätä lisäosaa vain, jos olet vähintään 18-vuotias tai vähintään täysi-ikäinen sen lainkäyttöalueella, jossa asut tai josta käytät tätä sisältöä. Jos et täytä näitä vaatimuksia, sinulla ei ole lupaa käyttää tätä lisäosaa.

Cet addon lit des vidéos de YouPorn, Tube8, Boysfood, MoviesAnd, PornoTube, xHamster, KeezMovies et d'autres sites de streaming pour adultes. Il contient du matériel explicite pour adultes. Vous ne pouvez voir cet addon que si vous avez au moins 18 ans, ou au moins l'âge de la majorité dans la juridiction où vous résidez ou à partir de laquelle vous accédez à ce contenu. Si vous ne remplissez pas ces conditions, vous n'êtes pas autorisé à utiliser ce module complémentaire.

Este complemento reproduz vídeos do YouPorn, Tube8, Boysfood, MoviesAnd, PornoTube, xHamster, KeezMovies e alguns outros sites de streaming adulto. Ele contém material adulto explícito. Você só pode visualizar este complemento se tiver pelo menos 18 anos de idade ou maioridade na jurisdição em que reside ou da qual acessa este conteúdo. Se você não atender a esses requisitos, não terá permissão para usar este complemento.

Denna addon spelar videor från YouPorn, Tube8, Boysfood, Movies And, PornoTube, xHamster, KeezMovies och några andra streamingwebbplatser för vuxna. Det innehåller tydligt vuxenmaterial. Du får bara se detta tillägg om du är minst 18 år, eller åtminstone majoritetsåldern i den jurisdiktion där du bor eller från vilken du får åtkomst till detta innehåll. Om du inte uppfyller dessa krav har du inte behörighet att använda detta tillägg.
extension.disclaimer: Der Autor hostet oder verbreitet keinen der von diesem Addon angezeigten Inhalte. Der Autor hat keine Verbindung zum Inhalteanbieter.
The author does not host or distribute any of the content displayed by this addon. The author does not have any affiliation with the content provider.
Kirjoittaja ei isännöi tai jaa mitään tämän lisäosan näytettyä sisältöä. Kirjoittajalla ei ole mitään siteitä sisällöntuottajaan.
L'auteur n'héberge ni ne distribue aucun des contenus affichés par cet addon. L'auteur n'a aucune affiliation avec le fournisseur de contenu.
O autor não hospeda nem distribui nenhum conteúdo exibido por este complemento. O autor não tem nenhuma afiliação com o provedor de conteúdo.
Författaren är inte värd eller distribuerar något av innehållet som visas av detta tillägg. Författaren har ingen anknytning till innehållsleverantören.

extension.description: First Try for a Adult Kodi Addon
Customizable repository which acts as a proxy for defined GitHub users' add-ons updates.
extension.news: - Allow running in standalone mode - Migrate to GitHub API - Add support for "tag_pattern" field - Add support for private repositories by supplying a "token" - Try to automatically determine zip ref from version - Multiple minor improvements

extension.summary: FENtastic Plus skin by Ivar Brandt, Zaxxon709 (Estuary MOD). Based on FENtastic v1.0.25
FENtastic Plus skin by Ivar Brandt, Zaxxon709 (Estuary MOD). Based on FENtastic v1.0.25
FENtastic Plus skin by Ivar Brandt, Zaxxon709 (Estuary MOD). Based on FENtastic v1.0.25
extension.description: FENtastic Plus is a modified version of the default Estuary skin for Kodi. It is intended for use with Fen Light, Umbrella, POV, TMDbH.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

FENtastic Plus is a modified version of the default Estuary skin for Kodi. It is intended for use with Fen Light, Umbrella, POV, TMDbH.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.

FENtastic Plus is a modified version of the default Estuary skin for Kodi. It is intended for use with Fen Light, Umbrella, POV, TMDbH.[CR][CR]See [B]CHANGELOG[/B] located in Skin settings » Extra info for latest changes.
